item.title: Ferring (Fertility Trials)
item.description:
• Summary: Ferring has terminated two fertility trials, signaling a strategic pullback in its reproductive medicine portfolio. This move reflects challenges or shifts in the company's focus within the fertility therapeutic area.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Biotech

item.title: Valneva (Lyme Disease Vaccine)
item.description:
• Summary: Valneva, in partnership with Pfizer, is developing a Lyme disease vaccine, VLA15. Despite a Phase 3 miss, the CEO argues that the data doesn't tell the whole story, highlighting ongoing efforts to address the disease.
  • MoAs: VLA15 is a multivalent recombinant protein vaccine targeting Borrelia burgdorferi, the bacterium causing Lyme disease.
  • Sources: Fierce Biotech
